title: Find All Anagrams
description: Given a string x containing a main word and a target word separated by a comma (e.g., 'cbaebabacd,abc'), find all start indices of the target word's anagrams inside the main word. Return the indices as a comma-separated string.
inputFormat: Two words separated by a comma
hint: Use a sliding window of the exact same size as the target word. Compare frequency arrays of size 26 (using Arrays.equals) to check if the current window is an anagram.
